2605.01102.title: Towards Multi-Agent Autonomous Reasoning in Hydrodynamics
2605.01102.paper_summary: Single-agent systems (SAS) have become the default pattern for LLM-driven scientific workflows, but routing planning, tool use, and synthesis through a single context window comes with a well-known cost: as tool specifications and observational traces accumulate, the effective context available for each decision shrinks, and end-to-end reliability suffers. We present a multi-agent system (MAS) prototype for hydrodynamics in which specialized agents are coordinated through a Layer Execution Graph (LEG). A planner agent constructs query-specific execution topologies from natural-language routing heuristics that capture domain knowledge without hard-coding it as rigid control logic; specialist agents operate under strict tool allowlists and occupy complementary data-class roles. Between layers, consolidator agents fuse parallel outputs into concise briefs, and a reporter agent synthesizes the final response, while the runtime logs provenance for every tool invocation to support auditability. All benchmarks, ablations, and stress tests use Claude Sonnet~4.6 as the backbone model for both specialist and general-purpose agents. Evaluated on 37 queries spanning six complexity categories, the prototype achieves 93.6% factual precision with a 100% pass rate. Accuracy remains above 90% across runs from single-threaded to five independent parallel tracks, and under simulated loss of individual data sources the system degrades gracefully, still returning substantive partial answers. Together, these results suggest that planner-guided, graph-structured multi-agent orchestration can meaningfully alleviate the context-saturation bottlenecks that constrain monolithic single-agent architectures.
2605.01102.paper_summary_zh: 單一代理系統（SAS）已成為基於大型語言模型（LLM）的科學工作流程的默認模式，但通過單一上下文窗口進行路由規劃、工具使用和合成帶來了一個眾所周知的成本：隨著工具規格和觀察痕跡的積累，每個決策可用的有效上下文縮小，端到端的可靠性受到影響。我們提出了一個多代理系統（MAS）原型，用於流體力學，其中專門的代理通過層執行圖（LEG）進行協調。一個規劃代理從自然語言路由啟發式中構建查詢特定的執行拓撲，這些啟發式捕捉領域知識，而不將其硬編碼為僵化的控制邏輯；專家代理在嚴格的工具允許清單下運作，並擔任互補數據類別角色。在層之間，整合代理將並行輸出融合成簡明的簡報，而報告代理則合成最終回應，同時運行時記錄每次工具調用的來源以支持可審計性。所有基準測試、消融實驗和壓力測試均使用Claude Sonnet~4.6作為專家和通用代理的基礎模型。在涵蓋六個複雜性類別的37個查詢上進行評估，該原型實現了93.6%的事實精確度，並且通過率為100%。在從單線程到五個獨立平行軌道的運行中，準確率保持在90%以上，在模擬單個數據源丟失的情況下，系統優雅地降級，仍然返回實質性的部分答案。綜合這些結果表明，規劃引導的圖結構多代理協調可以有意義地緩解限制單體單代理架構的上下文飽和瓶頸。
2605.01102.author: Jinpai Zhao et.al.
2605.01102.authors: Jinpai Zhao, Albert Cerrone, Joannes Westerink, Clint Dawson
